text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Disability Related Center Based Employment 41 Matching Service Providers ALBERTINA KERR VOCATIONAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment and work experience opportunities by sub-contracting with local businesses. 424 NE 22nd Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Age 16 and older with a documented disability Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 239-8101 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARC LANE COUNTY EMPLOYABILITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment services to help adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities determine their preferences, interests, and support needs related to integrated employment within the community. 4181 E Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Adults with intellectual or developmental disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 343-5256 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BENTON COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH BARBARA ROSS BUILDING DEVELOPMENTAL DIVERSITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services to individuals experiencing intellectual and/or developmental disabilities.
